heading: Progress reports
label: 2494 Progress reports
text: The President shall include as a part of the annual report required under an evaluation of progress that each major drug producing country and each major drug-transit country has made during the reporting period in achieving the objectives set forth in .section 2291h of title 22section 2492(b) of this title
notes: Amendments1999— substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 106–36section 2291h of title 22section 2291(e)(1) of title 22
amendments: Amendments1999— substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 106–36section 2291h of title 22section 2291(e)(1) of title 22
